Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
259 
NCH_PTNT_STUS_IND_CD 
LABEL: 
NCH Patient Status Indicator Code 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is a recoded version of the discharge status code (variable called 
PTNT_DSCHRG_STUS_CD). 
SHORT NAME: PTNTSTUS 
LONG NAME: NCH_PTNT_STUS_IND_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH QA Process 
VALUES: 
A = Discharged 
B = Died 
C = Still a patient 
COMMENT: 
This field should
